pokemon:jumpluff.name: Jumpluff
pokemon:jumpluff.summary: Jumpluff rides warm southern winds to cross the sea and fly to foreign lands. The Pokémon descends to the ground when it encounters cold air while it is floating.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Jumpluff rides warm southern winds to cross the sea and fly to foreign lands. The Pokémon descends to the ground when it encounters cold air while it is floating.
Blown by seasonal winds, it circles the globe, scattering cotton spores as it goes.
Blown by seasonal winds, it circles the globe, scattering cotton spores as it goes.
Even in the fierc­ est wind, it can control its fluff to make its way to any place in the world it wants.
Blown by seasonal winds, it circles the globe, scattering cotton spores as it goes.
JUMPLUFF ride warm southern winds to cross the sea and fly to foreign lands. This POKéMON lands when it encounters cold air while it is floating.
It drifts on seasonal winds and spreads its cotton-like spores all over the world to make more offspring.
Once it catches the wind, it deft­ ly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.
Once it catches the wind, it deftly controls its cotton-puff spores-- it can even float around the world.
Once it catches the wind, it deftly controls its cotton-puff spores to float, even around the world.

Blown by seasonal winds, it circles the globe, scattering cotton spores as it goes.

pokemon:skiploom.name: Skiploom
pokemon:skiploom.summary: Skiploom’s flower blossoms when the temperature rises above 64 degrees Fahrenheit. How much the flower opens depends on the temperature. For that reason, this Pokémon is sometimes used as a thermometer.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Skiploom’s flower blossoms when the temperature rises above 64 degrees Fahrenheit. How much the flower opens depends on the temperature. For that reason, this Pokémon is sometimes used as a thermometer.
It blooms when the weather warms. It floats in the sky to soak up as much sunlight as possible.
It blooms when the weather warms. It floats in the sky to soak up as much sunlight as possible.
As soon as it rains, it closes its flower and hides in the shade of a tree to avoid getting wet.
It blooms when the weather warms. It floats in the sky to soak up as much sunlight as possible.
It blossoms when the temperature rises above 64 degrees F. Because its flower’s blooming changes with the temperature, it is sometimes used as a thermometer.
It spreads its petals to absorb sunlight. It also floats in the air to get closer to the sun.
The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluc­ tuates up and down.
The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluctuates up and down.
The bloom on top of its head opens and closes as the temperature fluctuates up and down.

pokemon:hoppip.name: Hoppip
pokemon:hoppip.summary: This Pokémon drifts and floats with the wind. If it senses the approach of strong winds, Hoppip links its leaves with other Hoppip to prepare against being blown away.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon drifts and floats with the wind. If it senses the approach of strong winds, Hoppip links its leaves with other Hoppip to prepare against being blown away.
It drifts on winds. It is said that when Hoppip gather in fields and mountains, spring is on the way.
It drifts on winds. It is said that when Hoppip gather in fields and mountains, spring is on the way.
It can be carried away on even the gentlest breeze. It may even float all the way to the next town.
It drifts on winds. It is said that when HOPPIP gather in fields and mountains, spring is on the way.
This POKéMON drifts and floats with the wind. If it senses the approach of strong winds, a HOPPIP links leaves with others to prepare against being blown away.
Its body is so light, it must grip the ground firmly with its feet to keep from being blown away.
To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.
To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. But they do enjoy gentle breezes.
To keep from being blown away by the wind, they gather in clusters. They do enjoy gentle breezes, though.

It drifts on winds. It is said that when HOPPIP gather in fields and mountains, spring is on the way.
